start_flow: Added explicit submitting feedback and reset stale results/errors on each submit.
Kept contract-safe request body shape and metadata compaction behavior.
On successful start response, route transition now pushes directly to /onboarding/status with tenant_id/signup_event_id query params.
Added fallback manual link if redirect does not occur.
status_flow: Refactored status fetch into reusable checkStatus() for manual and automatic checks.
Added automatic initial status fetch when initialTenantId is provided from route query.
Improved loading/error/success handling without backend or contract changes.

constraints_respected: Only onboarding UI files were edited under frontend/onboarding.
